---
title: "Lab Notes"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  id: all-notes
  contents:
    - "books/*.qmd"
    - "courses/*.qmd"
    - "articles/*.qmd"
    - "!books/index.qmd"
    - "!courses/index.qmd"
    - "!articles/index.qmd"
  type: table
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, categories, date]
---

Everything I've read, taken a course on, or found worth writing down — filterable by type (Book / Course / Article) and topic below.

Browse by section: [Books](books/index.qmd) · [Courses](courses/index.qmd) · [Articles](articles/index.qmd)
